title: TensorFlow：面向所有人的开源机器学习框架
title_en: TensorFlow: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone
summary: TensorFlow是一个由Google开发的开源机器学习框架，支持从研究到生产的全流程，提供Python和C++接口，支持分布式训练和深度学习模型部署。它广泛应用于AI/LLM训练和推理，是业界最核心的ML基础设施之一。TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework developed by Google, supporting the full workflow from research to production with Python and C++ APIs, distributed training, and deep learning model deployment. It is widely used for AI/LLM training and inference, serving as one of the most core ML infrastructures in the industry.
